prose.en: Agencies MUST complete the Authorization to Operate process for federal information systems that use FedRAMP Certified cloud service offerings.

https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.note: FedRAMP provides technical assistance to help agencies navigate this process.
https://ns.fedramp.gov/cr26/facet/narrat.reference: Using a FedRAMP Certified Cloud Service Offering
